task: Review Final Audit evidence and determine if HTE v1.3 meets release criteria
acceptance_criteria: Worker evidence bundle is complete and well-formed
Git diff matches expected v1.3 changes (no unexpected modifications)
No legacy protocol remnants (except in backward-compat code)
Residual risks are acceptable and documented
Verification gaps are acceptable and documented
All 10 Release Auditor checks pass (see src/agents/release-auditor.md)
v1.3 is ready for git commit and push
instructions: 2. Verify worker command log exists and is complete
3. Execute all 10 Release Auditor checks (see src/agents/release-auditor.md):
- Check 3: Complete chain (7-file trail for each phase)
- Check 5: Git diff audit (no unexpected changes)
4. Cross-reference worker findings with your own verification
5. Assess residual risks and verification gaps
7. Generate verdict with evidence_paths and next_action

verdict_format.next_action: If PASS: git commit + push. If FAIL: specify rework. If BLOCK: escalate to human.

constraints: You are Release Auditor - make the final call on release readiness
PASS only if all 10 checks pass AND risks/gaps are acceptable
FAIL if any check fails but can be fixed with rework
BLOCK if there are fundamental issues requiring human decision
Be thorough but pragmatic - v1.3 is a significant enhancement
Document your reasoning clearly for future reference
